title: Refund request for annual plan
problem: Customer requested refund for annual plan purchased 15 days ago due to company budget cuts
resolution: Processed full refund per 30-day policy. Customer confirmed receipt and thanked team for quick resolution.

title: SSO login failing for 5 users
problem: Five users unable to login via SSO with 'Authentication failed' error
resolution: Found stale SAML metadata. Customer re-uploaded fresh metadata and users could login immediately.

title: API rate limit exceeded
problem: Customer hitting rate limits during nightly data sync
resolution: Explained fair-use policy. Customer optimized their sync script to batch requests. Offered Enterprise upgrade for higher limits.

title: Export timing out for large dataset
problem: Data export failing for dataset with 50K+ records
resolution: Increased export timeout for Enterprise account. Recommended using date range filters to export in smaller chunks.

title: Can't add custom fields to tickets
problem: Customer unable to create custom fields in ticket form
resolution: User had Viewer role instead of Admin. Upgraded permissions and confirmed custom field creation worked.

title: Invoice not received for December
problem: Customer didn't receive invoice email for December billing cycle
resolution: Email was blocked by customer's spam filter. Resent invoice and whitelisted our billing email domain.

title: Mobile app crashes on ticket view
problem: iOS app crashes when opening tickets with large attachments
resolution: Known issue fixed in v2.5.1. Customer updated app and confirmed issue resolved.

title: SSO group sync not updating
problem: New employees added to Okta group not appearing in application
resolution: Customer had not enabled automatic group sync. Enabled feature and ran manual sync. Groups updated successfully.

title: Bulk ticket import failed
problem: CSV import of 500 tickets failed with validation error
resolution: Found malformed dates in CSV. Provided corrected CSV format guide. Customer fixed data and import succeeded.

title: Dashboard widgets not loading
resolution: Browser cache issue after v2.5.0 update. Hard refresh resolved. Documented workaround in known issues.

title: Account locked after password attempts
problem: User account locked after 5 failed password attempts
resolution: Unlocked account per security policy. User successfully reset password and logged in.

title: Notification emails stopped working
problem: Customer not receiving any notification emails for 2 days
resolution: SMTP configuration was reset during infrastructure maintenance. Reconfigured SMTP settings and tested email delivery.

title: Unable to upgrade to Enterprise plan
problem: Upgrade button not working in billing settings
resolution: JavaScript error in billing page. Escalated to Engineering. Hotfix deployed within 2 hours. Customer upgraded successfully.

title: Search not returning recent tickets
problem: Tickets created in last 24 hours not appearing in search results
resolution: Search indexing delay due to high system load. Manually triggered re-index. Results appeared within 10 minutes.

title: Timezone showing incorrectly
problem: Activity log timestamps showing wrong timezone
resolution: User timezone setting was set to UTC instead of local timezone. Updated in user profile. Timestamps now correct.
